text.title: Design Review Facilitation Script Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Design Review Facilitation Script. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Feedback is structured in three rounds in strict order: clarify-questions → critique → suggest-alternatives; mixing rounds is rejected.
rule.rationale: Mixing rounds produces noise: clarifying questions get answered with critique, critique gets answered with alternatives, alternatives lose grounding.

rule.statement: Designer states the review-ask in a single sentence at meeting open; reviewers must keep feedback on that scope.
rule.rationale: Without a stated ask, reviewers default to 'all my opinions'; the ask focuses the room.

rule.statement: In the triage round each reviewer picks exactly one must-fix item; designer commits or explicitly declines with reason.
rule.rationale: Unbounded must-fix lists produce backlog rot; one-per-reviewer forces priority.

rule.statement: Designer commits or explicitly declines each must-fix item before meeting close; 'I'll think about it' is rejected.
rule.rationale: Deferred decisions recur in the next review; commit/decline ends the loop.

rule.statement: Committed must-fix items are created as tracker tickets in the same meeting; verbal-only commitments are rejected.
rule.rationale: Verbal commitments evaporate; tracker tickets create a trail.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do NOT run this methodology — emit a skip-record naming the failed precondition and route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above for flat methodologies), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-design-review-facilitation-script.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
